steps.title: Spot the defining signal
steps.content: The passage directly signals the difference: household electronics fields are "many times stronger" than the fields from water moving through Earth's magnetic field. The blank must capture this difference in degree or extent.

steps.title: Find the word for strength
steps.content:
The ______ of their sensitivities differs substantially — crayfish detect household electronics (strong fields), sharks detect Earth's magnetic field (weak fields), so the blank must mean the degree or scale of sensitivity. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — magnitude: the size or scale of something — perfectly captures how the strength of each animal's sensitivity differs substantially. ✓
  • Choice B — firmness: solidity or resoluteness — describes physical hardness or determination, not levels of electrical sensitivity. ✗
  • Choice C — gathering: a collection or assembly — irrelevant to comparing degrees of sensory ability. ✗
  • Choice D — orientation: direction or alignment — describes spatial positioning, not the scale of sensitivity. ✗
A is correct.
